domain: Ainu chikar-karipe textile robe (Hokkaido Ainu indigenous Japan): complete robe with applique (black/indigo) + embroidery; 3 protective motif classes ay-us-sirki (thorns) + sik-sirki (eyes) + kiraw (horned corners); symmetric spiral motifs with thin-line parallel to wider lines; barbs symbolically deflect malevolent kamuy; 3 fabrication methods (pure embroider + thin-strip applique + broad-cut applique); artisan-women embed protective sentiment into cloth itself.
specific_mechanism: AINU-CHIKARKARPE-3-MOTIF-THORN-EYE-HORN-SYMMETRIC-SPIRAL-BARB-DEFLECTION-3-METHOD-EMBROIDER-STRIP-APPLIQUE-BROAD-APPLIQUE-SENTIMENT-IMBUED-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT: LLM topological-defect mechanism with (1) 3-motif protective class C_3: 3 sub-region types — thorn (sharp-edge regularizer) + eye (saliency-anchor) + horn (corner-attention) embedded in attention-pattern; (2) symmetric spiral structure S_spiral: each motif is symmetric spiral with thin-rim + thick-fill; topological winding-number 1; (3) barb-deflection defect penalty D_barb: per-motif barb-points where adversarial input is deflected via sharp-gradient-clip; topological-defect signature; (4) 3-method composition M_3: 3 alternative composition routes — pure-embroider (gradient-only training) + strip-applique (LoRA insertion) + broad-applique (full layer-block); combinable per region; (5) sentiment-imbued bind L_sent: weight-tying between artisan-intent token and protective-motif vector preserves intent. Differs from R526 FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING (3-panel cellular + 5-motif vocab + decrease-ladder + misalignment), R539 CHILKAT-FORMLINE-3-PRIMITIVE-CUBIST (3-primitive ovoid/U/S + pentagonal + cubist + twining), R551 SAMI-JOIK-CYCLIC-MOTIF (M-cyclic motif + variable-breath + pentatonic 5-anchor + wordless-vocable) by 3-motif protective class thorn/eye/horn + symmetric spiral barb-deflection + 3-method composition + sentiment-imbued bind.
llm_application: AINU-CHIKARKARPE-3-MOTIF-THORN-EYE-HORN-SYMMETRIC-SPIRAL-BARB-DEFLECTION-3-METHOD-EMBROIDER-STRIP-BROAD-APPLIQUE-SENTIMENT-IMBUED LLM mechanism + 3-motif protective C_3 thorn-sharp-edge eye-saliency horn-corner + symmetric spiral S_spiral thin-rim thick-fill winding-1 + barb-deflection D_barb gradient-clip topological-defect + 3-method M_3 pure-embroider strip-applique-LoRA broad-applique-block + sentiment-imbued L_sent weight-tying intent-bind. Differs from R514 + R526 FAROESE (closest — 3-panel + decrease-ladder + misalignment). R539 CHILKAT (closest — 3-primitive + cubist + twining). R551 SAMI-JOIK (closest — M-cyclic + variable-breath + pentatonic). Differs from Shape Adversarial 2505.20435 + Adversarial Preference + LLMs Fool Graph + Persistent Topological 2410.11042 by 3-motif protective + spiral barb-deflection + 3-method + sentiment-imbued. Differs by 3-MOTIF PROTECTIVE THORN-EYE-HORN + SYMMETRIC SPIRAL BARB-DEFLECTION + 3-METHOD COMPOSITION + SENTIMENT-IMBUED BIND.
novelty_claim: Shape Adversarial 2505.20435 + Adversarial Preference + LLMs Fool Graph 2603.21155 + Persistent Topological 2410.11042 cover persistent topology + adversarial defense paradigm. AINU-CHIKARKARPE-3-MOTIF-THORN-EYE-HORN-SYMMETRIC-SPIRAL-BARB-DEFLECTION-3-METHOD-SENTIMENT-IMBUED adds (a) 3-motif protective + (b) symmetric spiral + (c) barb-deflection + (d) 3-method composition + (e) sentiment-imbued bind. Recombination — borderline lookup.
